pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Switch compiler configuration from separate source/target to unified release flag set to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old source/target configuration targets Java 11, which is incompatible with the target JDK 21 migration goal; using 'release' ensures proper cross-compilation and API usage checks for Java 21.

src/main/java/com/apply/kmcg/Quality_Pro.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.

src/main/java/com/apply/kmcg/Scaffolds_P.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
src/main/java/com/apply/kmcg/Scaffolds_P.why_exists: List.getFirst() is a new method introduced in Java 21; using it requires the target JDK to be 21 or higher, but the change itself is a modernization of an existing valid pattern rather than a fix for a broken build on the old JDK.

src/main/java/com/apply/kmcg/Scaffolds_P.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted to use the new Java 21 API.
src/main/java/com/apply/kmcg/Scaffolds_P.why_exists: String.formatted() is a new method introduced in Java 21; using it requires the target JDK to be 21 or higher, but the change itself is a modernization of an existing valid pattern rather than a fix for a broken build on the old JDK.
